query:
-- ─── invoices: nuevos campos de trazabilidad, pago y abono ───────────────────
ALTER TABLE invoices
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('generada','enviada','cobrada','anulada','abonada') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'generada',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceType ENUM('factura','abono') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'factura' AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod ENUM('redsys','transferencia','efectivo','otro') DEFAULT 'redsys' AFTER invoiceType,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedBy INT DEFAULT NULL AFTER paymentMethod,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL AFTER paymentValidatedBy,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER paymentValidatedAt,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofKey TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER transferProofUrl,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isAutomatic TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER transferProofKey,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditNoteForId INT DEFAULT NULL AFTER isAutomatic,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditNoteReason TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER creditNoteForId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sentAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL AFTER creditNoteReason,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastSentAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL AFTER sentAt,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sentCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER lastSentAt;

-- ─── reservations: nuevos campos de factura, pago y canal ────────────────────
ALTER TABLE reservations
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceId INT DEFAULT NULL AFTER quoteSource,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceNumber VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL AFTER invoiceId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod ENUM('redsys','transferencia','efectivo','otro') DEFAULT NULL AFTER invoiceNumber,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedBy INT DEFAULT NULL AFTER paymentMethod,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedAt BIGINT DEFAULT NULL AFTER paymentValidatedBy,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER paymentValidatedAt,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS channel ENUM('web','crm','telefono','email','otro') DEFAULT 'web' AFTER transferProofUrl;
